source_file: Sourced via WebSearch (SEC EDGAR 403'd) — Businesswire/press-release earnings summaries, Q1 FY2027 + Q4/Q3 FY2026

quarterly_revenue.note: Asana fiscal year runs Feb-Jan, so 'Q1 FY2027' is roughly calendar Q1 2026. Only 3 quarters pulled in this pass (Q3 FY26, Q4 FY26, Q1 FY27) — same trailing-window gap as the MNDY case.

revenue_growth_rate.citation: Q1 FY2027 earnings release + FY2027 full-year guidance, Businesswire

ndr.trend: 97% for 4 consecutive quarters — net retention below 100% (contracting), unlike MNDY's expansion. Enterprise-tier NDR not broken out publicly, so enterprise = overall here and the nudge is 0 by construction, not fabricated.
ndr.citation: Q1 FY2027 earnings call, Motley Fool transcript

gross_margin.trend: roughly flat, in line with MNDY's 89%

customer_counts.citation: Q1 FY2027 earnings release. $500K+ tier not disclosed by Asana — only $100K+ and 'Core' ($5K+, 26,103 customers, +7% YoY) tiers are public.

rpo.citation: Q4 FY2026 earnings release (most recent RPO breakout found). cRPO absolute dollar figure not located in this pass — only the 17% YoY growth rate was disclosed.

deferred_revenue.citation: Q4 FY2026 earnings release — one quarter behind the Q1 FY2027 revenue base; no Q1 FY2027 figure located in this pass.

non_gaap_operating_margin.citation: prior_fy_actual uses Q4 FY2026 quarterly non-GAAP op margin (9%) as a proxy — a clean full FY2026 actual wasn't confirmed in this pass. Guidance is FY2027 'at least 9.75%' (single figure, not a range, per Q1 FY2027 release).

known_gaps: Enterprise-tier NDR not broken out publicly by Asana — used overall NDR (97%) for both fields, so the model's NDR-spread nudge is 0 by construction, not fabricated.
$500K+ ARR customer tier not disclosed — only $100K+ (817 customers) and Core $5K+ (26,103 customers) tiers are public.
cRPO absolute dollar figure not located in this data pull — only the 17% YoY growth rate is known; the dollar figure is null.
Deferred revenue figure is from Q4 FY2026, one quarter behind the Q1 FY2027 revenue base used elsewhere in this file.
prior_fy_actual non-GAAP operating margin uses a single quarter (Q4 FY2026, 9%) as a stand-in for a full-year actual — flagged as an approximation, not a confirmed FY figure.
Trailing revenue growth window is 2 quarters, not 4 — same structural gap as the MNDY case (SEC EDGAR blocked; press-release sourcing only covers what each release reports).
